steps.title: Spot the core principle
steps.content: The passage opens by stating that nature-based conservation initiatives can effectively address environmental challenges, then demonstrates this principle with the logjam restoration example.

steps.title: Match to the main idea
steps.content: B expresses the passage's main claim that nature-based approaches work for conservation goals. A reframes the focus to partnership, C narrows to the specific logjam-salmon detail, and D adds a comparison to non-nature-based methods that the text never makes. That matches choice B — B is correct.
